title: 193 Mathematics d e MO nstrati O n
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: 193 Mathematics d e MO nstrati O n
objective:
To add two algebraic expressions (polynomials) using different strips
of cardboard.
materials:
Cardboard, coloured papers (green, blue and red),
geometry box, cutter, eraser, adhesive, sketch pen.
procedure:
1.   Take three pieces of cardboards and paste coloured papers on them.
Green on one, blue on the second and red on the last one.
2.   Make sufficiently large number of squares (strips) of side   x   units on
green paper and cut them out [Fig. 1].
3.   Similarly, draw rectangle of dimensions   x   ×   1 on blue coloured paper
and square of dimensions 1   ×   1 unit on red coloured paper and cut
them out [Fig. 2 and Fig. 3].
Fig. 1   Fig. 2   Fig. 3
discussion:
This result can be used to explain
1.   Property of a linear pair.
2.   Meaning of vertically opposite angles.
194 Laboratory Manual – Elementary Stage
